meta.description: Arabic-first RTL checklist and transformation operating system.

operatingSystem.title: 120-Day Transformation Operating System
operatingSystem.recoveryProtocol: Recovery protocol: after each 15-day sprint, run 3 active recovery days (walk, mobility, review, sleep debt reset).

systems.fatLossBody: Calorie deficit 400-600/day, protein 1.8-2.2g/kg target weight, 8k-12k daily steps, strength 4x/week, cardio 3x/week, weekly average weight tracking.
systems.incomeBody: Daily applications + proposals, weekly portfolio output, networking outreach, fast cash micro-services, long-term productized dev offers.
systems.footer: Plan = 7 phases (6x15 days + final 12 days) with {recovery}-day recovery between phases.

overviewPage.title: Full 120-Day Overview
overviewPage.subtitle: Core transformation goals only. No daily phase details in this page.

income.title: Increase Monthly Income
income.description: Target monthly income reaches 30,000 EGP through jobs, freelancing, and better conversion.

weight.title: Weight Loss Goal
weight.description: Move from 90kg to 75kg with sustainable fat loss, muscle retention, and disciplined nutrition.

quitAddiction.title: Quit Porn & Masturbation
quitAddiction.description: Build a clean streak and eliminate relapse triggers through strict rules and replacement habits.

varicocele.title: Varicocele Surgery
varicocele.description: Complete medical consultation and procedure planning to support long-term health and stability.

backend.title: Backend Track (Node.js)
backend.description: Complete core backend path in Node.js with practical APIs, authentication, and real project delivery.

frontendSenior.title: Reach Senior Frontend Level
frontendSenior.description: Advance architecture, performance, and production patterns to reach senior-level frontend capability.

motivation.low: Reset now. One focused day rebuilds momentum.
motivation.mid: Solid effort. Protect tonight and win tomorrow early.
motivation.high: You are in control. Keep stacking clean days.
motivation.elite: Elite execution. Stay humble, repeat tomorrow.

1.mainGoal: Complete Sprint 1 with >= 80% execution and zero avoidance behavior.
1.kpis: Daily checklist completion percentage | Streak of clean days | Bodyweight trend (weekly average) | Income generated / opportunities created
1.mistakes: All-or-nothing mindset after one bad day | Late-night phone use causing relapse risk | Applying randomly without tracking conversion | Overtraining with poor sleep
1.correction: If 2 consecutive weak days happen, reduce workload by 20% for 48h, keep non-negotiables, then ramp back up.
1.review: What gave the best results? | What triggered low-output days? | What exact rule must be tightened next sprint? | Which skill/income metric improved measurably?
